local_dependency: Python 3.10+ for the deterministic headless compiler
Optional Draw.io desktop CLI for PDF export
Optional external Draw.io MCP for a live editor session
known_risks: Generated diagrams and imported private specifications must stay out of Git.
Headless compilation does not prove a live Draw.io MCP or desktop connection.
PDF export is unavailable unless a verified Draw.io desktop executable is present.
next_steps: Validate optional Draw.io desktop PDF export on each supported operating system.
Keep live MCP and ELK integrations optional until their pinned adapters pass cross-platform tests.
Extend the guarded handoff plan only through each target bridge's own confirmation gate.
